case_title: EMANUEL, DAVID VS SMITH, JOSHUA L.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EMANUEL, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, JOSHUA L. $5,986.00 PRINCIPAL, $134.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,120.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-17-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-12-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO APRIL 12, 2006 AT 8:30 A.M. TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT SENT TO JOSHUA SMITH RETURNED UNDELIVERED. INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,986.00 FILED BY EMANUEL, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, JOSHUA L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, JOSHUA L.
NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO SMITH, JOSHUA RETURNED UNDELIVERED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, JOSHUA L.
